featureName: BUG-058-INGEST-SCOPE-403: extension ingest scope gate split into two scopes 403s every real per-user token

executionHistory.summary: Sweep round 16 (harden lens) of spec 060/058 auth wiring found that internal/api/router.go wires POST /v1/connectors/extension/ingest with auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") — two separate scopes under AND-semantics with exact slices.Contains matching. getScopeClaim (internal/auth/verify.go) reads the PASETO scope claim as []string WITHOUT splitting on ',', so a real per-user token carries Scopes=["extension:bookmarks,history"] (one element). Neither bare substring matches, so every legitimate per-user token is 403'd. Verified by reading the canonical contract (spec 060 spec.md L15/L70/L138; spec 058 design.md L295/L330/L498/L684) and by a red regression test through the real NewRouter.

Single bugfix-fastlane scope: restore the gate to the canonical single scope auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks,history"). SCN-058-027..029 authored in scenario-manifest.json. No contract change (the contract already mandates the single scope); pure wiring correction.

internal/api/router.go: changed RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") to RequireScope("extension:bookmarks,history"); corrected the adjacent comment to the single-scope contract + regression-test reference. No token-format change, no schema migration, no change to internal/auth/* or the extension handler.

Scenario-first red->green in new internal/api/router_extension_scope_test.go: TestExtensionIngest_CanonicalScopeReachesHandler mints a real per-user PASETO (auth.IssueToken, Scopes=["extension:bookmarks,history"]) and drives the real NewRouter — RED 403 before the fix, GREEN after. TestExtensionIngest_MissingScopeRejected (no-scope token -> 403) is the adversarial twin. Adversarial re-RED: reverting router.go to two scopes fails the canonical test (REVERT_RC=1).
Full internal/api package green (ok 9.435s) with the two new tests; go build ./internal/api/... and go vet ./internal/api/ clean. No collateral regression.
One-line wiring change + one focused regression file; no new abstractions, no dead code.
Deterministic HTTP-layer test; no new perf hot path; no flakiness surface.

The bug fails CLOSED (over-restrictive 403), not open — no unauthorized access was ever granted. The fix restores the intended single-scope gate; tokens lacking extension:bookmarks,history still 403 (adversarial twin proves enforcement). Shared-token/bootstrap bypass unchanged. No framework files touched.
artifact-lint PASSED for the packet; build/vet/test green. Evidence in report.md.

Diff confined to internal/api/router.go (one wiring line + comment) and the new internal/api/router_extension_scope_test.go; no migration; no .github/bubbles changes; parent spec 058 (blocked) artifacts untouched.

router.go comment documents the single-scope contract + regression test. The parent spec 058 report.md L19 (documents the old two-scope form) is noted as a non-goal to refresh when spec 058 unblocks, to keep the blocked parent's evidence stable.

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane single-line wiring fix; no convergence loop required

resolvedFindings.summary: POST /v1/connectors/extension/ingest was gated with auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") — two separate scopes — while the canonical per-user token carries the single comma-joined scope "extension:bookmarks,history"; AND-semantics exact-match rejected every legitimate token 403. Shipped undetected because dev/test shared-token + bootstrap sessions bypass the scope gate.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Restored the gate to the single canonical scope auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks,history") in internal/api/router.go (matches spec 060 spec.md L15/L138 + spec 058 design.md L295/L684). Added internal/api/router_extension_scope_test.go: TestExtensionIngest_CanonicalScopeReachesHandler (red->green through the real NewRouter) + TestExtensionIngest_MissingScopeRejected (adversarial twin). Adversarial re-RED proves a revert re-fails.
resolvedFindings.evidence: report.md Test Evidence (RED 403 body required:["extension:bookmarks"] -> GREEN ok; re-RED REVERT_RC=1); internal/api/router.go RequireScope("extension:bookmarks,history"); full internal/api ok 9.435s.
